file.description: PDF (multipart field) or base64 string (JSON fallback).

fileName.description: Required with the base64 JSON fallback.

objectionPeriodDays.description: PASSIVE only: objection period in days.

objectionConsequence.example: If you object, your existing terms remain in force and we may contact you about the change.
objectionConsequence.description: PASSIVE only: shown on the acceptance page next to the objection button.

gracePeriodDays.description: Deprecated: no longer drives ACTIVE blocking (legacy rows only).

hardDeadlineAt.description: ACTIVE only: absolute acceptance deadline as a full ISO date-time. Required to publish an ACTIVE version and must be >= validFrom; every customer must accept by then or is blocked.

validFrom.description: ISO date from which the revision applies. May lie in the FUTURE (scheduled effectiveness): publishing rolls out immediately for advance acceptance, while the previous version stays the compliance baseline until this date.
